app_actor_identity_shape.name: app_actor_identity_shape
app_actor_identity_shape.value:
("app_actor"."actor_type" = 'human' and "app_actor"."identity_provider" is not null and "app_actor"."provider_subject" is not null)
        or ("app_actor"."actor_type" = 'system' and "app_actor"."provider_subject" is null)

audit_event_tenant_select.name: audit_event_tenant_select
audit_event_tenant_select.using:
"audit_event"."organization_id" = nullif((select current_setting('app.organization_id', true)), '')::uuid
  and "audit_event"."workspace_id" = nullif((select current_setting('app.workspace_id', true)), '')::uuid

audit_event_tenant_insert.name: audit_event_tenant_insert
audit_event_tenant_insert.withCheck:
"audit_event"."organization_id" = nullif((select current_setting('app.organization_id', true)), '')::uuid
  and "audit_event"."workspace_id" = nullif((select current_setting('app.workspace_id', true)), '')::uuid

lead_lifecycle_transition_initial_shape.name: lead_lifecycle_transition_initial_shape
lead_lifecycle_transition_initial_shape.value:
("lead_lifecycle_transition"."version" = 1 and "lead_lifecycle_transition"."previous_stage" is null and "lead_lifecycle_transition"."next_stage" = 'new')
        or ("lead_lifecycle_transition"."version" > 1 and "lead_lifecycle_transition"."previous_stage" is not null)

outbox_message_lease_shape.name: outbox_message_lease_shape
outbox_message_lease_shape.value:
("outbox_message"."lease_owner" is null and "outbox_message"."lease_expires_at" is null)
        or ("outbox_message"."lease_owner" is not null and "outbox_message"."lease_expires_at" is not null)
